candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction (>=80%) but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0, treat the signal as UNVALIDATED and freeze — conviction without historical pattern confirmation is unproven direction, not tradeable edge.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: green_matches=0 means the current live indicator configuration has never been seen paired with a winning outcome in memory; conviction only measures agreement among indicators at this instant, not whether that agreement historically resolved profitably. USDJPY today shows the trap: conv=100% LONG but hist_hr=0% — a fresh, untested consensus that safe-haven flow (L8) can corrupt. Institutional rate-signal reliability degrades exactly when indicators cluster without historical precedent, because clustering often reflects a crowded one-way positioning about to mean-revert.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr <= 0.10: veto_entry() # require at least one historical green_match before trusting high-conviction direction
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Filters out zero-precedent high-conviction entries (e.g. USDJPY LONG conv=100%/hist_hr=0%); expected to prevent -0.3R to -0.5R losers on untested clusters, lifting win rate ~3-5% and Sharpe toward the +0.05 gap by removing high-variance unproven trades.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: Live consensus shows USDJPY conv=100% LONG with green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, while GBPUSD/EURUSD/AUDUSD SHORT signals carry green_matches=0 but hist_hr 66-70% — the contrast isolates hist_hr and green_matches as the discriminating fields, not conviction alone.

retirement_flag.reason: L8 tightens the USDJPY/AUDNZD VIX gate to 13 for safe-haven corruption; with VIX now 17.65 and a live USDJPY conv=100%/hist_hr=0% signal, L8's gate should already be vetoing this trade — if it is not, the gate threshold or wiring may be decaying and needs re-verification.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in the last 7 days with regime=UNKNOWN and TradingView showing 0 signals means the system is effectively in observation-only mode — no decision logs to mine, so lessons must stay harvest/consensus-grounded until trade flow resumes.
